name: Tubercidin
description: An antibiotic purine ribonucleoside that readily substitutes for adenosine in the biological system, but its incorporation into DNA and RNA has an inhibitory effect on the metabolism of these nucleic acids.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Tubercidin.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Tubercidin.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Tubercidin.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Tubercidin.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Tubercidin.
